movesList.name: ub
inputs: u  uf      Jump Up-Back            Jump Up         Jump Up-Forward

movesList.name: b -- n -- f
inputs: Walk Back / Block       Neutral         Walk Forward

movesList.name: db
inputs: d  df      Crouch / Low Block      Crouch          Offensive Crouch

movesList.name: LP
inputs: HP  PA      Light Punch        Hard Punch        Partner Button A

movesList.name: LK
inputs: HK  PB      Light Kick         Hard Kick         Partner Button B

movesList.name: pushblock
inputs: -  Another name for Advancing Guard (press PP when blocking)

movesList.name: Taunt
inputs: -  Press Start + LK / MK (for the DC), or just Start (if

movesList.name: Mid-Air Block
inputs: Hold b / db when attacked while in air
